mapper.select: SELECT id, reservation_id, device_id, user_id, borrow_time, return_time, expected_return_time, status, borrow_check_status, return_check_status, remark, operator_id, return_operator_id, created_at, updated_at FROM borrow_record WHERE reservation_id = #{reservationId} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, reservation_id, device_id, user_id, borrow_time, return_time, expected_return_time, status, borrow_check_status, return_check_status, remark, operator_id, return_operator_id, created_at, updated_at FROM borrow_record WHERE status = 'BORROWED' AND return_time IS NULL AND expected_return_time < #{referenceTime} ORDER BY expected_return_time ASC

SELECT id, reservation_id, device_id, user_id, borrow_time, return_time, expected_return_time, status, borrow_check_status, return_check_status, remark, operator_id, return_operator_id, created_at, updated_at FROM borrow_record WHERE status = 'OVERDUE' AND return_time IS NULL ORDER BY expected_return_time ASC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM borrow_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'OVERDUE' AND return_time IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE borrow_record SET return_time = #{returnTime}, return_check_status = #{returnCheckStatus}, remark = #{remark}, return_operator_id = #{returnOperatorId}, status = 'RETURNED', updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id} AND status IN ('BORROWED', 'OVERDUE') AND return_time IS NULL
